We’re making healthier happen

For health plan members like Laly, switching to Aetna® gave her access to a Healthy Home Visit, a comprehensive in-home health evaluation through Signify Health®, test results and a plan to manage her condition. As part of CVS Health®, we’re building a world of health around every individual, creating a connected health experience and providing members with dedicated care they can trust.


View video transcript

About Signify Health

Signify Health, a CVS Health company, helps make health care services more convenient with in-home and virtual health evaluations and in-home diagnostic screening services.

Explore Signify Health

About Aetna*

Aetna enables you to use your health coverage in a way that works for your personal health needs. We connect you to an incredible range of trusted benefits, care, guidance and support.

Explore Aetna health plans

Healthier happens together®

At CVS Health®, we connect people to the care they need, put medicine and wellness within reach, and drive greater affordability, simplicity, and convenience across all we do.

How we're making healthier happen

Laly: My husband and I changed to Aetna Health Care Supplement for Medicare this year. I have chronic health issues, so I welcome any help I can get in terms of looking after my health. Then one day, I got a phone call that I identified that a nurse would be coming to visit me to check on my health.

I'm going to be 69 soon. I realize that I need all the help I can get and I had never known that there would be a visiting nurse as part of my program or my health plan.

And she sounded so nice on the phone and so helpful. And it was a very surprising visit because she was so well prepared, friendly, and made me feel comfortable from the beginning.

But most of all, she carried out some tests that I had never had before, even in my doctor's office. And then she had the information right then and there. She had a camera for my eye, and she checked my circulation on my legs and all these things. She got results right then and there.

Plus, she really was thorough in finding out all my medications, my conditions, my pre-existing conditions and all this and advising me on some steps to take regarding making appointments to check my vision, making an appointment to check with the dermatologist.

And it was a very easy-going interview where I felt that somebody cared to look at all my issues with health and give me very, very good suggestions for my well-being. So I really encourage people, if you're part of the Aetna family and you get that call from Signify Health, please give it a try.

Back to top

  • *FOR ABOUT AETNA: Aetna Medicare is an HMO, PPO plan with a Medicare contract. Our DSNPs also have contracts with State Medicaid programs. Enrollment in our plans depends on contract renewal. Plan features and availability may vary by service area.

    To send a complaint to Aetna, call the Plan or the number on your member ID card. To send a complaint to Medicare, call 1-800-MEDICARE (TTY users should call 1- 877-486-2048), 24 hours a day/7 days a week. If your complaint involves a broker or agent, be sure to include the name of the person when filing your grievance.

    Aetna and Signify Health® are part of the CVS Health® family of companies.
